text: The world here is structured, modern, and purposeful. As I pass through the stark, glass front of one space into the vibrant, intellectually charged atmosphere of the next, I feel the tension between order and creativity. Here, ideas are displayed and innovation is celebrated, and I am struck by the collaborative nature of knowledge. Yet, there is also a sense of separateness—barriers of glass and curated displays. I wonder about the invisible thresholds we cross in pursuit of understanding, and whether the openness we seek is physical, conceptual, or both.
